name: consensus
description: Consensus create, refine, and evaluate skills for multi-peer deliberation.

interface.shortDescription: Create, refine, and evaluate artifacts with two-peer deliberation.
interface.longDescription: Consensus deliberation skills for creating artifacts from briefs, refining markdown drafts, or evaluating artifacts against rubrics with multiple AI peers and an audit trail.
defaultPrompt: Use Consensus Create to draft from a brief, Consensus Refine to improve a markdown draft, or Consensus Evaluate to judge an artifact against a rubric.

release_checklist: Verify exec permission shape and skill path syntax against the Codex runtime through local plugin installation before v0.1 tagging.
